content: Happy new year everyone ✨️

Targets are:

Chaos:
Hameln (serviceable at E0, wants E2) 
Ryker (serviceable at E0, wants E1)
Grace Through Pain (Raises Wielder's Shield / Poison Generation. Grants bonus Crit Rate / Damage to Wielder's "Strike" Cards. Grants Shield whenever Wielder casts a "Strike" Card, once per Turn. One of the best WoDs for Mouchette.)
Wheel Unseen) (Raises Handsize by 2, doubles Keyflare Capacity, grants bonus Crit Rate / Damage, Aliemus / Shield / Strength to Wielder's Cards whenever they are played, stacks up to 5 times.)

Aequor
Myriam (serviceable at E0, wants E2)
Tulu (Support for GMurphy, just need Base Copy)
Hymn of the Sovereign (Generates Aliemus for Wielder at the start of Battle. Grants Wielder Aliemus whenever another Ally casts Exalt. Aequor - Specific, raises Tentacle Damage after Wielder casts Exalt)
Power of the Pious (Raises Wielder's Aliemus Generation, Poison Damage and Crit Damage. Aequor - Specific, raises Tentacle Count & Limit by 1 at the start of Battle.)
Shrouded Birth (Raises Wielder's Shield Generation, grants Temporary Crit Rate to all Awakeners and Keyflare after Wielder generates Shield, up to twice per Turn. Aequor - Specific, grants Wielder Aliemus whenever Tentacles attacks.)

Caro
Thais (serviceable at E0, wants E2)
GHelot (Top #10 DPS, needs E3)
Merciful Nurturing (Raises Handsize by 2. Gain Keyflare based on a large portion of the Wielder's Keyflare Regen. Each time a Posse Skill is cast, grants Aliemus to all Awakeners in Team. Caro - Specific, also increases Embryo Fusion.)

Ultra
Horla (serviceable at E0, wants E2)
The Last Verse (Raises Crit Rate / Damage, Aliemus / Health Shield Generation of the Wielder's Command Cards. Ultra Specific, gain Keyflare after using Anhiliation, next Posse Skill after entering the Ultra Round will be casted twice.)
Happy New Year to you too dude
Thankss

Is Caro/Ultra's Realm that much better if tentacles fall off?

Yes

Caro's mechanics are healing and embryos (aliemus), healing is better than white stance and aliemus is always good whether the boss has 5000 or 5 million hp

Ultra's mechanics are card draw, arithmetica, extra turns, which are good whether the boss has 5000 or 5 million hp

Chaos you didn't mention, but they get keyflare and aliemus. Again, good regardless of how big the boss stats are

Aequor is in a uniquely bad spot because tentacle damage scales so poorly compared to boss hp, and tentacle shields are capped at a low % of max hp
ultra and chaos are considered the strongest realms in endgame
caro and aequor are more carried by specific characters that are good
Oh, it's worth it to use an all Chaos team for the Realm Mastery bonus?

How do you play this team?, I'm really confused lol<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
For that team
You only gotta understand how castor kit works
In short, his quasar (first card played each turnl) gives shield and put a plume into the deck, his exalt put 3 plume into the deck
Note it's first card played, not his first card played
Plumes has retain, if you hold them in your hand, you gain shield at the end of turn
Attacking an enemy with plume give them a debuff called corrosion
That basically increase all form of damage you do to them until corrosion stacks run out
Your game play decision is basically deciding when to hold plumes and when to play them

Hello, could someone help me finish my team comps for D-tide? I have W1 aurita clear, and tried to use a whale Doresain support in W3, but not sure who to pair him with (i died in like 3 turns on A4). For last 3 i was thinking of Mouchette-Thais-Aigis-Helot and GMurphy-Tulu-Murphy-???  and no idea what in 3rd team. Also which waves should i send them to would be helpful! <:dead:1356082627509092372>   (I'm kinda broke, but can probably level some units to like 50)

for the whale doresain support - you need HP to live until doresain comes online, as well as embryo generators. Put ramona, nautila, agrippa and stack as much death res as you can. With a bit of luck you should be able to do W3A5

here are other teams you can run:

W2: castor murphy winkle caecus (try to get poison and counter relics)

W4: gmurphy tulu miryam goliath

W5: mouchette helot thais aigis
